caption: A person pours a white liquid from a white bottle labeled "MIR" into a matching white "MIR" cup. In the initial scene, the word "OPENING" appears in white capital letters against a dark background. As the sequence progresses, the shot transitions to a split-screen view. On one side, a man with short dark hair wears black headphones and a black jacket, positioned in front of a microphone. On the other side, a woman with long dark hair, wearing a dark green long-sleeved shirt and a necklace, holds the "MIR" cup as the liquid is poured into it. The man looks toward the woman with a slight smile. The background behind the man consists of a dark, ribbed wall. The scene remains consistent across the latter frames, maintaining the split-screen composition and the ongoing action of pouring the liquid.
